title: TickFlow
description: A lightweight, intelligent server optimization plugin designed to maintain a stable 20 TPS and eliminate lag without breaking vanilla mechanics.
body:
[![Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/paper_vector.svg)](https://papermc.io)
[![Purpur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/purpur_vector.svg)](https://purpurmc.org)
[![Github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/DalvSync/TickFlow)

# TickFlow ⚡
A lightweight, Folia-compatible optimization plugin designed to squeeze maximum performance out of any hardware. TickFlow targets the biggest causes of server lag without ruining the vanilla survival experience.

### 🚀 Features:
* **Fully Configurable:** Every feature can be easily toggled and fine-tuned in the generated `config.yml`.
* **Auto-Lobotomy for Villagers:** Automatically detects villagers trapped in trading halls or iron farms (e.g., inside vehicles or 1x1 boxes) and disables their pathfinding AI to heavily reduce CPU load. Free-roaming villagers remain completely unaffected.
* **Aggressive Item & XP Merging:** Intelligently merges dropped items and experience orbs within a configurable radius. This drastically reduces the number of ticking entities the server needs to process during heavy farming or explosions.
* **Fast Trash Despawn:** Common clutter blocks (Cobblestone, Dirt, Netherrack, Gravel, Andesite, Diorite, Granite) despawn much faster (default: 45 seconds) to keep your world clean and save CPU cycles.
* **Projectile Cleanup:** Instantly removes useless skeleton arrows upon hitting a block, while safely preserving player-shot arrows and tridents.

### ⚙️ Compatibility
* Native support for **Folia**,**Paper** and **Purpur**.
